message:
feat(summary): add RenderSummary helper for format conversion

generator.go:
- Add RenderSummary() function to format an existing SessionSummary
  using a specified output format
- Supports detailed, handoff, and brief formats
- Falls back to stored text if format unrecognized
- Builds handoff summary on-demand if not present

summary.go:
- Import path updates and refactoring for summary rendering

This enables re-rendering cached summaries in different formats
without regenerating from source data.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
